title: Complete Your Order
subtitle: You're one step away from creating a beautiful song for {name}
securePaymentNote: Your payment is secured by Stripe. We never store your card details.
oneTimePayment: One-time payment • No subscription • No recurring charges

genreVariant.title: New Music Style
genreVariant.subtitle: New lyrics crafted for a different sound
genreVariant.sameLyrics: New lyrics written from scratch for this style

lyricsUpsell.title: Song Lyrics PDF
lyricsUpsell.subtitle: A beautifully designed PDF with your song's lyrics
lyricsUpsell.description: Print, frame, or share with your loved one

karaokeUpsell.title: Your Moment on Stage
karaokeUpsell.subtitle: The karaoke version of your custom song
karaokeUpsell.description: Sing the song you created at parties, gatherings, or family karaoke

streamingVip.title: VIP Streaming Distribution
streamingVip.subtitle: Your song on Spotify, Instagram, TikTok, WhatsApp & more
streamingVip.item1: Official release just like famous artists
streamingVip.coversTitle: Professional cover art by our team
streamingVip.coversSubtitle: Check out some covers we've created for our customers
streamingVip.paymentSubtitle: Pay now to secure your VIP Distribution

musicianTip.title: Support Our Musicians
musicianTip.subtitle: Your appreciation means the world to our artists
musicianTip.description: 100% goes directly to the artists who created your song

pixInfo: Pix payments are processed instantly. You'll receive a QR code to complete the payment.

alreadyPaid.title: Payment Already Completed
alreadyPaid.description: This order has already been paid. We're working on your custom song!

error.title: Order Not Found
error.description: We couldn't find this order. It may have expired or the link is incorrect.
error.paymentSetup: Failed to set up payment. Please try again.
error.paymentFailed: Payment failed. Please check your details and try again.

paymentFailed.title: Payment Not Completed
paymentFailed.generic: The payment was not processed. Please try again.
paymentFailed.cardDeclined: Your card was declined. Please check your details or try a different payment method.
paymentFailed.actionRequired: Payment authentication was not completed. Please try again.
paymentFailed.pixSuggestion: Tip: Pix payments are instant and don't require card details. Just scan the QR code!

success.title: Payment Successful!
success.subtitle: We're now creating a beautiful custom song for {name}
success.statementDescriptor: Your card statement will show: APOLLOSONG.
success.readFullPageNotice: Please read this entire page to understand exactly how you will receive your song.
success.step1Desc: Check your inbox for order confirmation and details.
success.step2Desc: Our talented musicians will craft a unique song based on your story.
success.step3Desc: Your custom song will be delivered by {date}.
success.emailNote: A confirmation email has been sent to {email}

emailEdit.title: Review your details
emailEdit.prompt: Forgot something or want to change it? Review your email and story details below.
emailEdit.label: Delivery email
emailEdit.error: We couldn't update your email. Please try again.
emailEdit.invalid: Please enter a valid email address.

storyReview.title: Review your story details
storyReview.description: Confirm the information we will use to write your lyrics. You can add as much detail as you want, with no word limits. Include dates, milestones, places, and anything memorable. The more specific, the better.
storyReview.saved: Story updated. We will rewrite your lyrics with these details.
storyReview.error: We couldn't update your story. Please try again.
storyReview.helper: Saving will regenerate the lyrics from scratch using your new details.
storyReview.messagePlaceholder: Optional - add anything else you'd like included.

trackOrder.title: Where to Listen to Your Song
trackOrder.description: This is the link where you'll listen and download your song when it's ready. Save it to WhatsApp now so you don't lose it!
trackOrder.descriptionMid: where you'll listen and download your song when it's ready.
trackOrder.saveLinkNote: Your song will be delivered at this link. Save it to WhatsApp!

whatsAppBackup.title: Backup WhatsApp
whatsAppBackup.description: Add a WhatsApp number to receive your song in case there's an issue with email delivery.

tipSuccess.title: Thank You So Much!
tipSuccess.subtitle: Your generosity warms our hearts
tipSuccess.description: Your contribution of {amount} was received with gratitude and goes directly to the talented musicians who created your song.
tipSuccess.impact2: Helping create more songs that touch hearts
tipSuccess.fromMusicians: From our entire team of musicians:
tipSuccess.thankYouMessage: Every note you heard was composed with love and dedication. Your recognition inspires us to keep creating songs that move people and transform special moments into eternal memories.
tipSuccess.shareDescription: Know someone who also deserves a special song?

genreVariantSuccess.title: New style confirmed!
genreVariantSuccess.subtitle: We're creating the {genre} version for {name}
genreVariantSuccess.description: Payment of {amount} confirmed. We'll add the new version of {name}'s song to your order.
genreVariantSuccess.next1: You'll receive the new style within 24 hours.
genreVariantSuccess.next2: Once it's ready, it will appear in your Track Order page.

lyricsUpsellSuccess.title: Lyrics PDF confirmed!
lyricsUpsellSuccess.subtitle: {name}'s lyrics are ready
lyricsUpsellSuccess.description: Payment of {amount} confirmed. Your PDF is ready to download now.
lyricsUpsellSuccess.next1: Your PDF is ready to download now.
lyricsUpsellSuccess.next2: You can also access it from your Track Order page.

lyricsUpsellPending.title: Lyrics PDF confirmed!
lyricsUpsellPending.subtitle: We'll release {name}'s lyrics with the song
lyricsUpsellPending.description: Payment of {amount} confirmed. Your PDF will unlock as soon as the song is delivered.
lyricsUpsellPending.detailsStatusValue: Available when the song is ready
lyricsUpsellPending.next1: As soon as the song is delivered, your PDF will appear here.
lyricsUpsellPending.next2: You can also download it from your Track Order page.

streamingVipSuccess.title: VIP Distribution confirmed!
streamingVipSuccess.subtitle: Your song will be public on Spotify, Instagram & TikTok.
streamingVipSuccess.description: Now we just need the person's photo to create the official cover art.
streamingVipSuccess.next1: Send the best photo of the person (face visible) via WhatsApp.
streamingVipSuccess.next2: We create the cover and publish your song. You'll get a confirmation once it's live.
streamingVipSuccess.whatsAppMessage: Hi! I just purchased the VIP Distribution. Here's the cover photo. Order: {orderId}. Email: {email}.
streamingVipSuccess.chooseNameDesc: Select the name that best fits your tribute
streamingVipSuccess.chooseSong: Which version do you prefer for Spotify?
streamingVipSuccess.chooseSongDesc: Listen to both options and choose your favorite
streamingVipSuccess.nowSendPhoto: Now just send the photo for the cover
streamingVipSuccess.chooseSongVersion: Which version do you want on Spotify?
streamingVipSuccess.chooseSongVersionDesc: Listen to both options and choose your favorite

karaokeUpsellSuccess.title: Karaoke version confirmed!
karaokeUpsellSuccess.subtitle: Our artists are already preparing the karaoke version of {name}'s song

karaokeUpsellSuccess.next1: Our artists are already preparing your karaoke version and it will be ready in up to 15 minutes.

karaokeUpsellSuccess.next2: You can download the karaoke version directly from your order tracking link.

karaokeUpsellSuccess.trackingLinkDesc: Use this link to check the status and download your karaoke version when it's ready:
